notes:
I've designed an Instagram-inspired creator portfolio archive with a polished, image-first aesthetic. I started by creating the "Lumière Noir" design system to establish a high-end, mobile-native visual rhythm with selective gradients and minimalist typography.

From there, I built out three core views for the "Digital Gallery Archive":
1. **Creator Profile**: A modular header with a focus on Elias Vaughn's artistic vision, balanced by a high-contrast grid of selected works.
2. **Portfolio Archive Grid**: A curated, gallery-style view with image-first composition and dense but breathable pacing.
3. **Project Detail View**: A narrative-driven layout (like the "Void & Silence" series) that uses large hero visuals and a "Tonal Palette" module to emphasize craftsmanship.

All screens are designed to work together as a cohesive digital exhibition.
prompt: Create an Instagram-inspired creator portfolio archive with image-first composition, selective gradients, gallery pacing, creator profile modules, and a polished mobile-native visual rhythm.
title: Portfolio Archive Grid
